steps.title: Track the location
steps.content: The first sentence identifies India as the country associated with the Cheruku rasamu mango. The next sentence gives a mango production figure, so the transition should point back to that same place.

steps.title: Choose the place marker
steps.content: Choice A suggests the production figure is a consequence of the mango's origin. Choice C suggests emphasis or correction, and Choice D suggests narrowing a point. The sentence simply means that in India, 18.8 million metric tons of mangoes were produced in 2018. The answer is B.
